docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSBORNE, CHRISTINE AS TO DEFENDANT BECKSTEAD, ERIN DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-09-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-09-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-24-2004
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSBORNE, CHRISTINE SERVED APR-08-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BECKSTEAD, ERIN
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BECKSTEAD, ERIN
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF FIRM NAME FILED BY ATTORNEY ALBINI, DIANNA L
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSBORNE, CHRISTINE JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BECKSTEAD, ERIN JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR SEP-13-2004. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-18-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. JUL-09-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE SEP-23-2004.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR JOSEPH JEDEIKIN.
ARBITRATOR RICHARD BARD WEINSTEIN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION SEP-24-2004 THROUGH DEC-23-2004.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-24-2005 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
STIPULATION TO CONTINUE PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE & TO CONTINUE JURISDICTION OF ARBITRATOR, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSBORNE, CHRISTINE
DECLARATION OF THOMAS M HOSTETLER ISO STIPULATION TO CONTINUE PREARBITRATION SETTLEMENT & TO CONTINUE JURISDICTION OF ARBITRATOR FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSBORNE, CHRISTINE
ORDER --PER COMM. BORICK--TO CONTINUE PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE TO NOV-29-2004 AT 01:30 PM AND EXTEND JURISDICTION OF ARBITRATOR RICHARD BARD WEINSTEIN TO MARCH 23, 2005, FILED
PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-18-2004 CONTINUED TO NOV-29-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN 212
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL ON ORDER TO CONTINUE PRE-ARBITRATION SETT CONF FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSBORNE, CHRISTINE

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-24-2005 CONTINUED TO APR-21-2005 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR IS EXTENDED THROUGH MAR-23-2005. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON JAN-24-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT
REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR - DISMISSAL FILED.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-21-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
